one_time_description: Investment loss from partnership (Note 7) of $1,882,669 recorded in 2023 vs $493,636 in 2022
economic_notes: Operates L'sitkuk Gas Bar, Fisheries, and Digby Pines Golf Resort and Spa. Has partnerships accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Large investment loss from partnership of $1,882,669 significantly impacts results. Entities consolidated include Bear River First Nation Housing Projects, Health Center, L'sitkuk Gas Bar Limited, 3331786 Nova Scotia Limited, 3331787 Nova Scotia Limited, and Digby Pines Golf Resort and Spa. ISC funding derived from Department of Indigenous Services Canada amount in Note 6 ($278,288); total government transfers calculated as federal operating ($3,723,373) + federal capital ($660,205) + provincial operating ($102,002) = $4,485,580. Asset retirement obligation of $87,849 adopted April 1, 2022 under PS 3280. expenses_enterprises estimated as L'sitkuk Gas Bar ($1,925,467) + Fisheries ($1,171,196) + Economic Development ($212,448) combined. Annual debt service based on repayment of long-term debt from cash flow statement.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
